itemdesc-mallet:
Basicaly LOG on a stick
 the ORGANIC Alternative to Hammers.
itemdesc-carburization_powder: A 'magical' dark grey dust...ask the metal sages how its used...
blockdesc-pack_carburization-unfired: Heat beyond transition temperature for a while.
itemdesc-sword-*: A Steel sword blade in the anchient style of 'Gladii'...
itemdesc-spear-*: A Spear with the 'Dory' style pattern, wrought in steel.
itemdesc-sharpening_stone: Use in combination with _DULL_ steel items and grease to sharpen
craftinginfo-primitive_steelmaking-text: So, you want to make steel? You'll need Lots and Lots of Charcoal! More Iron than you know what to do with! First step: combine Charcoal, Bonemeal and crush by hammering - makes Carburization Powder! Next make a Coffin or 'Pack' of blue-clay with lots of the previous steps powder packed around an iron object (tool-head, blade, ect...nothing too big). Then Fire it in a furnace or firepit for quite a long time - until it glows RED-HOT! Take out the 'pack' after its finished heating, and place the pack on any solid surface; break to open. Steel items can also be quenched. To improve edged steel - sharpen after hardening.
